## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)

## Definition of Done Checklist
<!-- Confirm the following before requesting a review. -->
- [ ] Code builds locally without errors or warnings.
- [ ] All architectural rules are respected (no business logic in routes, no SQL in services, etc.).
- [ ] New unit and/or integration tests have been written and pass (`pytest` / `vitest`).
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, API keys, or database URLs are present.
- [ ] Documentation (OpenAPI spec, docstrings, Markdown) has been updated where required.
- [ ] Commit history is clean and follows Conventional Commits.
- [ ] I have self-reviewed this code against the standards in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
